title: ACTIS Bundle Manifest Schema v1.0
description: Normative schema for manifest.json in ACTIS v1.0 evidence bundles. The manifest lists bundle contents and defines which paths are required for ACTIS verification.

standard.description: When present with name ACTIS, bundle is ACTIS-aligned; verification uses core_files only.

core_files.description: Relative paths required for ACTIS verification. MUST be unique. Each path MUST be a relative path (forward slashes), MUST NOT contain '..', MUST NOT be absolute or include drive prefixes. For ACTIS v1.0 the default minimal set is: checksums.sha256, manifest.json, input/transcript.json.

optional_files.description: Relative paths that are not required for ACTIS pass/fail. Same path format rules as core_files.
